title: Principal Frontend Developer at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates:
Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India Asia Pacific Associates!
